title: A screen can copy almost everything but the room. — Daniel Fox
meta_description: How a physical store competes with e-commerce: a screen can match price, selection, and convenience, but it cannot put a person in a room that feels a certain way, and music is the part of that room online cannot copy.

schema.headline: A screen can copy almost everything but the room.
schema.description: How a physical store differentiates from e-commerce: a screen matches price, selection, and convenience, but cannot reproduce the feel of a room, and music is the part of that experience online cannot copy.
